chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1743 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case(Priority) 1.For orders on o/objections 2.For hearing of CMA 6848/25 3.For hearing of main case 06-11-2025 Mr. Ahmed Nawaz Shar, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Farooq Ahmed Leghari, Advocate for respondents. Mr. Agha Athar Pathan, Assistant A.G. **** Counsel for the petitioner, under instructions, does not press instant petition, which is according disposed of as not pressed along with listed application(s). JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
